releaseNotes:
What's New:
- Dynamic folder colors based on background
- High-speed de-throttled downloads
- Added In-app Update system
- Bug fixes and performance improvementsMusic App Initial Release v3.1.3 #force
🎵 What's New in v3.1.3
We've polished the app to make your music experience smoother and more beautiful! Here is what's changed:

🛡️ Smarter Permission Handling: A new, beautiful permission screen to help you manage Media and Notification access easily.

⏩ 'Skip for now' Option: You can now skip the permission screen and dive straight into your music. We’ll only ask for system permissions when necessary.

🎨 Dynamic Design: The permission page now features a dynamic background that matches your music's artwork, keeping the UI consistent and premium.

🚀 Better Stability: Fixed several critical crashes (including the lateinit errors) to ensure the app runs perfectly every time you open it.

⚙️ Background Improvements: Optimized background services for Widgets, Playback, and Downloads for a lag-free experience.

🐛 Bug Fixes: Squashed minor bugs to improve overall performance.
Enjoying the app? Keep the feedback coming! 🎧✨
